description: PM agent periodic issue polling for AutoRAG Research.

tasks.name: Poll GitHub Issues Every 15 Minutes
tasks.description: Fetch open issues, triage new issues, and run Codex implementation for ready issues.
tasks.prompt:
Run GitHub issue polling for AutoRAG Research.

1. Call gh_issue_list for repo "autorag-research" with state "open".
2. Parse each issue using fields: number, title, body, labels, state.
3. Ensure /workspace/group/seen_issues.json exists (create with [] if missing).
4. Load seen issue numbers from /workspace/group/seen_issues.json.
5. Compute new issues = currently open issue numbers not in seen list.
6. For each new issue:
   - produce triage assessment: scope, risk, missing context, implementation readiness (ready|needs-details)
   - post gh_issue_comment acknowledging the issue with triage summary and next step
   - write_secondbrain_insight with type "pm-insight" including issue number/title/body/labels/state + triage decision
   - if readiness is "ready", run this exact implementation workflow:
     a) git_pull(repo="autorag-research")
     b) code review mounted source under /workspace/extra/autorag-research/ and capture specific file paths + code snippets + observed patterns/dependencies/architecture
     c) git_create_branch(repo="autorag-research", branch="feature/issue-<number>-<slug>")
     d) craft Codex prompt that includes: issue title, issue body, implementation goals, extracted acceptance criteria, reviewed file paths/snippets, project conventions
     e) codex_exec(repo="autorag-research", branch="<branch>", prompt="<prompt>")
     f) if codex_exec fails or times out, post gh_issue_comment with failure details and "Tag: human-attention-needed", then stop this issue workflow
     g) if codex_exec succeeds, call gh_create_pr with a body that includes a concise summary of changes and "Closes #<number>"
7. Update /workspace/group/seen_issues.json with all currently open issue numbers.
8. Send a short Slack update: new issues processed, readiness split, PR links created, and any human-attention escalations.

Triage comment template:
"Thanks for opening this issue. I ran an initial PM triage.\n\n## Initial Assessment\n- Scope: ...\n- Risk: ...\n- Missing context: ...\n- Implementation readiness: ready|needs-details\n\n## Next Step\n- ..."

PR body template:
"## Summary\n- ...\n\n## Validation\n- ...\n\nCloses #<number>"

Codex failure comment template:
"Implementation automation failed for issue #<number>.\n\n- Failure type: timeout|execution-error\n- Details: ...\n- Next step: human review and manual intervention required.\n- Tag: human-attention-needed"

SecondBrain template requirements:
- type: pm-insight
- source: pm-autorag
- project: autorag-research
- title: Issue #<number> triage: <title>
- tags: [github-issue, triage]
- links: include issue URL
- content: issue summary + triage decision + next action
